title: Waiting For Texto
description: Part Stand-up comedy, part play, Waiting for Texto is a hilarious, painfully accurate depiction of the angst of unrequited love. Described as "Bridget Jones meets Baby Reindeer", This play is for anyone who's agonised over sending a text. jokes, poignant moments and a twist! Terrifically impressive, warm and funny - ★★★★ The Scotsman I loved this play and can’t wait to see what Aideen writes next. She’s a keeper! - One4review ★★★★★ An hour of beautiful solo writing, brashly, boldly and skilfully delivered, with deeper roots into some important questions about life - Funny Women

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
